MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION As To Breach Of Covenant Of Quiet Enjoyment
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF (CONSOLIDATED CASE) JEREMIAH ABEL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO BREACH OF COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Continued To Jun-13-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-544392 WITH CASE CGC-14-539014
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tom Elke, Esq. (415-294-4111) of Elke & Merchant for Plaintiff/ opposing party Madelyn Fish.
Aisa Villarosa, Esq. (415-835-9825) of Bracamontes & Vlasak for Plaintiff/ opposing party Abel Jeremiah (CGC-14-544392).
Steven Abern, Esq. (510-763-2324) of Haapala, Thompson & Abern LLP for Defendant/Moving party MARIA BURLUK and EKATERINA VENGLEVSKA.

The Court informs parties of it's inclination to grant the motion but is concerned with discovery. Plaintiff's Counsel Villarosa has no opposition to the motion. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS MARIA BURLUK and EKATERINA VENGLEVSKA's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-544392 WITH CASE CGC-14-539014 is Granted for all purposes. The lead case is the older case CGC-14-539014. The trial date of September 14, 2015 remains. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
